rss.channel:
朝九晚五 https://9to5mac.com/ Apple 新闻和 Mac 谣言全天爆发2026 年 3 月 11 日星期三 14:35:00 +0000 en-US每小时1 https://wordpress.org/?v=6.9.3 https://9to5mac.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/6/2019/10/cropped-cropped-mac1-1.png?w=32朝九晚五https://9to5mac.com/ 32 32 146091842 Apple TV 上的美国职业棒球大联盟即将回归，以下是即将推出的内容https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/major-league-baseball-on-apple-tv-returns-soon-heres-whats-coming/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/major-league-baseball-on-apple-tv-returns-soon-heres-whats-coming/#respondRyan Christoffel Wed, 11 Mar 2026 14:35:00 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043157

苹果的运动产品阵容不断壮大。继美国职业足球大联盟和一级方程式赛季开始后，Apple TV 也即将首播美国职业棒球大联盟 (MLB) 比赛。以下是完整的详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/major-league-baseball-on-apple-tv-returns-soon-heres-whats-coming/feed/ 0 1043157 Apple Arcade 的 4 月份阵容增加了两款近期最受欢迎的独立游戏https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/apple-arcades-april-lineup-adding-two-of-the-most-acclaimed-recent-indie-games/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/apple-arcades-april-lineup-adding-two-of-the-most-acclaimed-recent-indie-games/#respondZac Hall Wed, 11 Mar 2026 14:27:07 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043170

Apple Arcade 的 4 月份阵容将为订阅游戏平台推出三款新游戏。其中包括过去几年最受好评的几款独立游戏。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/apple-arcades-april-lineup-adding-two-of-the-most-acclaimed-recent-indie-games/feed/ 0 1043170 新款 iPhone 18 Pro 曝光，探索设计细节、尺寸等https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/new-iphone-18-pro-leaks-explore-design-details-dimensions-more/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/new-iphone-18-pro-leaks-explore-design-details-dimensions-more/#respondRyan Christoffel Wed, 11 Mar 2026 14:11:19 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043161

今天，微博爆料者发布了两条与新 iPhone 18 Pro 相关的帖子，概述了该产品的设计、尺寸等方面的预期。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/new-iphone-18-pro-leaks-explore-design-details-dimensions-more/feed/ 0 1043161 第一段视频展示了 Vision Pro 上的 X-Plane 12，其中包括正在运行的 ARKit 技巧https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/first-footage-shows-x-plane-12-on-vision-pro-include-an-arkit-trick-in-action/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/first-footage-shows-x-plane-12-on-vision-pro-include-an-arkit-trick-in-action/#commentsZac Hall Wed, 11 Mar 2026 13:54:07 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043156

昨天我们获悉，“世界上最先进的飞行模拟器”即将与 Apple Vision Pro 配合使用。现在我们可以初步了解体验如何，包括 ARKit 如何智能地处理物理控制。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/first-footage-shows-x-plane-12-on-vision-pro-include-an-arkit-trick-in-action/feed/ 1 1043156 Apple 重点介绍了今天上市的七款新产品https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/apple-highlights-the-seven-new-products-available-today/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/apple-highlights-the-seven-new-products-available-today/#respondBen Lovejoy Wed, 11 Mar 2026 13:41:48 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043144

苹果公司重点介绍了今天早上在网上和世界各地的苹果商店发售的所有新产品。

不出所料，该公司将 MacBook Neo 定位为七款新品中的头条新闻……

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/apple-highlights-the-seven-new-products-available-today/feed/ 0 1043144 对于 Apple Music 订阅者来说，TikTok 上的音乐发现功能变得更加强大https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/music-discovery-on-tiktok-just-got-a-lot-more-powerful-for-apple-music-subscribers/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/music-discovery-on-tiktok-just-got-a-lot-more-powerful-for-apple-music-subscribers/#respondZac Hall Wed, 11 Mar 2026 13:36:44 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043147

TikTok 和 Apple Music 联手为 iPhone 用户带来两项新功能。得益于独家合作伙伴关系，Play Full Song 允许Apple Music 订阅者“无需离开 TikTok 即可收听完整音乐播放”。 TikTok 表示，聆听派对旨在将艺术家和粉丝在平台上聚集在一起。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/music-discovery-on-tiktok-just-got-a-lot-more-powerful-for-apple-music-subscribers/feed/ 0 1043147 您的 MacBook 可以拥有 Apple 彩虹标志和新的“1984”皮肤https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/your-macbook-can-have-apples-rainbow-logo-with-new-1984-skin/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/your-macbook-can-have-apples-rainbow-logo-with-new-1984-skin/#respondRyan Christoffel Wed, 11 Mar 2026 13:30:51 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043137

对于 Mac 来说，这是重要的一周，今天推出了三款新 MacBook 。为了庆祝，dbrand刚刚推出了一系列新的“1984”皮肤，为您的 MacBook 的 Apple 标志带来复古外观。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/your-macbook-can-have-apples-rainbow-logo-with-new-1984-skin/feed/ 0 1043137 特斯拉主要竞争对手的电动 SUV 将于本周推出 CarPlay https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/carplay-coming-this-week-for-a-major-tesla-competitors-electric-suv/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/carplay-coming-this-week-for-a-major-tesla-competitors-electric-suv/#commentsZac Hall Wed, 11 Mar 2026 13:21:16 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043136

电动汽车制造商 Lucid 从明天开始为其 Gravity SUV 提供 Apple CarPlay 支持。虽然有传言称特斯拉正在努力支持 Apple CarPlay，但 Lucid Gravity 首先又生产了一款配备 iPhone 功能的电动汽车车型。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/carplay-coming-this-week-for-a-major-tesla-competitors-electric-suv/feed/ 2 1043136 1100 万个 Facebook 和 Instagram 诈骗账户被消灭，新警报启动https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/11m-facebook-and-instagram-scam-accounts-zapped-new-alerts-launched/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/11m-facebook-and-instagram-scam-accounts-zapped-new-alerts-launched/#respondBen Lovejoy Wed, 11 Mar 2026 12:04:17 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043121

Me ta表示，它已删除了超过 1.59 亿个诈骗广告，并删除了Facebook和Instagram上的 1090 万个诈骗账户。该公司今天还在 Instagram、Facebook 和WhatsApp上推出了新的反诈骗工具。这些旨在提醒您注意三种最常见的诈骗策略……

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/11m-facebook-and-instagram-scam-accounts-zapped-new-alerts-launched/feed/ 0 1043121 郭分享 MacBook Neo 出货量和触摸屏更新、OLED MacBook Air 时序https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/kuo-shares-macbook-neo-shipment-and-touchscreen-updates-oled-macbook-air-timing/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/kuo-shares-macbook-neo-shipment-and-touchscreen-updates-oled-macbook-air-timing/#commentsZac Hall Wed, 11 Mar 2026 11:49:15 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043120

MacBook Neo 发布日已经到来，供应链分析师 Ming-Chi Kuo 对苹果首款 599 美元笔记本电脑有一些有趣的见解。郭还给出了苹果首款 OLED MacBook Air 上市的时间表。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/kuo-shares-macbook-neo-shipment-and-touchscreen-updates-oled-macbook-air-timing/feed/ 1 1043120 MacBook Neo 并不正式支持快速充电，但更强大的充电器会有所帮助https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/the-macbook-neo-doesnt-officially-support-fast-charging-but-a-beefier-charger-helps/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/the-macbook-neo-doesnt-officially-support-fast-charging-but-a-beefier-charger-helps/#respondBen Lovejoy Wed, 11 Mar 2026 11:21:52 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043114

苹果为MacBook Neo列出的妥协之一是它不支持快速充电，并且该机器仅配备 20W 电源适配器（欧洲除外）。

根据苹果的声明，在新机器上使用更强大的充电器似乎没有任何意义，但测试表明并非如此……

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/11/the-macbook-neo-doesnt-officially-support-fast-charging-but-a-beefier-charger-helps/feed/ 0 1043114
